title: Hostel Facilities | Galgotias University
content: Welcome to the vibrant and enriching hostel life at Galgotias University! We take immense pride in providing a safe, comfortable, and nurturing environment that fosters personal growth and unforgettable experiences. Our on-campus hostel facilities are designed to be your home away from home, offering a perfect blend of modern amenities and a supportive community. With a capacity of 1,400 seats in Boys Hostel and 280+ seats in Girls Hostel, our AC and non-AC hostels cater to diverse preferences, ensuring a comfortable living experience for every student. Stepping into our hostel rooms, you will find them thoughtfully equipped with anti-glare films, ensuring a glare-free study environment. Our dedicated housekeeping team ensures meticulous cleanliness, allowing you to focus on your academic pursuits without any worries. We understand the importance of staying connected, which is why we have installed Wi-Fi devices to provide seamless and uninterrupted internet access. Additionally, our four elevators/lifts ensure convenient mobility within the hostel premises. Dining is an integral part of the hostel experience, and our fully air-conditioned dining hall offers a delightful culinary journey. In collaboration with Sodexo, a leading food services and facilities management company, we ensure that our students receive nutritious, hygienic, and flavourful meals. Sodexo's team of experienced chefs and culinary experts cater to diverse tastes and preferences from different regions, providing a rich and varied menu. We also have on-campus cafeterias providing a lively and jolly atmosphere to unwind and socialize. The Boys Hostel at Galgotias University offers a wide range of facilities across multiple levels to ensure a well-rounded and enriching experience for our students: Hostel Facilities Amenities & Features: Your safety and well-being are our top priorities. Our hostel premises are under strict security cover, with trained and well-disciplined personnel ensuring a safe and welcoming environment. Moreover, medical facilities are available on the hostel premises, providing prompt assistance whenever needed. We believe that hostel life is more than just a living arrangement; it's an opportunity to learn, grow, and create lifelong memories. Our dedicated warden and hostel in-charge live on campus, ensuring that your concerns are addressed promptly and efficiently. We invite you to embark on this transformative journey and experience the vibrant hostel life at Galgotias University. Embrace the opportunities for personal growth, forge lasting friendships, and create memories that will stay with you forever. Welcome to your new home away from home! Hostel Admission Procedure Step I: Visit Admission office/Accounts office Step II: Select Hostel Type (AC/Non-AC) Step III: Make Payment Hostel Fee Boy's Hostel Fee Twin Occupancy, AC room - Rs. 1,71,000 per annum Twin Occupancy, Non-AC room - Rs. 1,60,000 per annum Girl's Hostel Fee Triple Occupancy (attached washroom), AC room – Rs. 1,71,000 per annum Triple Occupancy (attached washroom), Non-AC room – Rs. 1,60,000 per annum Note: Mess Charges are included in Hostel fee. Hostel and Mess Fees are subject to revision every year NEFT Payment Detail for HOSTEL Name of The Account | Galgotias University, Uttar Pradesh | Account Number | 6420000100006861 | Account Type | Saving Bank Account | Payee Bank | PUNJAB NATIONAL BANK | Address of Branch | Punjab National Bank ,Sector-63 GAUTAM BUDDHA NAGAR-201301, UP | IFSC Code | PUNB0671700 | Swift Code | PUNBINBBMSN | MICR code | 110024298 | After Making the payment, existing students are requested to fill the NEFT form available in the student ERP login (iCloud EMS). List of articles to be brought by students while reporting at hostel Note: Knives, Weapons of any type, Alcohol/Drugs, Personal Vehicle are strictly Prohibited. Dance Practice Chess Carrom Badminton Gym Laundry Pool Pickleball Court Snooker Squash Court Table Tennis
